name: zvid_selected_d3d_device_name
description: zVid selected D3D device name accessor returns the selected device-name buffer or the default GameZ string when no D3D device is selected.
known_limits: No known functional limits. The native smoke verifies null-selected fallback and selected-record buffer identity for zVid::GetSelectedD3DDeviceNameOrDefault.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison passed for ?GetSelectedD3DDeviceNameOrDefault@zVid@@YAPADXZ at 0x4a9940 with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; 1 trailing VC NOP byte trimmed.
